documentation.readme: Mobile Security Framework (MobSF) is a security research platform for mobile applications in Android, iOS and Windows Mobile. MobSF can be used for a variety of use cases such as mobile application security, penetration testing, malware analysis, and privacy analysis. The Static Analyzer supports popular mobile app binaries like APK, IPA, APPX and source code. Meanwhile, the Dynamic Analyzer supports both Android and iOS applications and offers a platform for interactive instrumented testing, runtime data and network traffic analysis. MobSF seamlessly integrates with your DevSecOps or CI/CD pipeline, facilitated by REST APIs and CLI tools, enhancing your security workflow with ease.
usage_sections: Try MobSF Static Analyzer Online: mobsf.live

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.

use_cases: When you need Automated mobile app pentest platform, use Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF because Mobile Security Framework (MobSF) is a security research platform for mobile applications in Android, iOS and Windows Mobile. MobSF can be used for a variety of.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `docker run -it --rm -p 8000:8000 opensecurity/mobile-security-framework-mobsf:latest` as documented upstream for Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF.
When chaining Automated mobile app pentest platform tools, pair Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
